name: paseto-wasm
description: A PASETO implementation in Rust with WebAssembly (WASM) bindings

scripts.build:wasm: rimraf pkg && pnpm run build:wasm:web && pnpm run build:wasm:node && pnpm run build:wasm:web:v3 && pnpm run build:wasm:node:v3
scripts.build:wasm:web:v3: mkdirp pkg/v3 && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg/v3 --features v3 --no-default-features
scripts.build:wasm:node: mkdirp pkg/cjs && wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg/cjs && shx mv pkg/cjs/paseto_wasm.js pkg/cjs/paseto_wasm.cjs
scripts.build:wasm:node:v3: mkdirp pkg/v3/cjs && wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg/v3/cjs --features v3 --no-default-features && shx mv pkg/v3/cjs/paseto_wasm.js pkg/v3/cjs/paseto_wasm.cjs
scripts.test: pnpm run test:wasm:node && pnpm run test:wasm:web:v3
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run removeDirsBeforePrepublish

author: Achmad Kurnianto
